testcase.name: [1.1:19] Get Existing User By ID
testcase.failure:
org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: match failed: EQUALS $ | not equal | actual has 6 more key(s) than expected - {"id":1,"name":"Leanne Graham","username":"Bret","email":"Sincere@april.biz","address":{"street":"Kulas Light","suite":"Apt. 556","city":"Gwenborough","zipcode":"92998-3874","geo":{"lat":"-37.3159","lng":"81.1496"}},"phone":"1-770-736-8031 x56442","website":"hildegard.org","company":{"name":"Romaguera-Crona","catchPhrase":"Multi-layered client-server neural-net","bs":"harness real-time e-markets"}} (MAP:MAP) {"id":1,"name":"Leanne Graham","username":"Bret","email":"Sincere@april.biz","address":{"street":"Kulas Light","suite":"Apt. 556","city":"Gwenborough","zipcode":"92998-3874","geo":{"lat":"-37.3159","lng":"81.1496"}},"phone":"1-770-736-8031 x56442","website":"hildegard.org","company":{"name":"Romaguera-Crona","catchPhrase":"Multi-layered client-server neural-net","bs":"harness real-time e-markets"}} {"data":{"id":"#number","email":"#string","first_name":"#string","last_name":"#string","avatar":"#string"},"support":{"url":"#string","text":"#string"}}

testcase.name: [1.2:19] Get Existing User By ID
testcase.failure:
org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: match failed: EQUALS $ | not equal | actual has 6 more key(s) than expected - {"id":2,"name":"Ervin Howell","username":"Antonette","email":"Shanna@melissa.tv","address":{"street":"Victor Plains","suite":"Suite 879","city":"Wisokyburgh","zipcode":"90566-7771","geo":{"lat":"-43.9509","lng":"-34.4618"}},"phone":"010-692-6593 x09125","website":"anastasia.net","company":{"name":"Deckow-Crist","catchPhrase":"Proactive didactic contingency","bs":"synergize scalable supply-chains"}} (MAP:MAP) {"id":2,"name":"Ervin Howell","username":"Antonette","email":"Shanna@melissa.tv","address":{"street":"Victor Plains","suite":"Suite 879","city":"Wisokyburgh","zipcode":"90566-7771","geo":{"lat":"-43.9509","lng":"-34.4618"}},"phone":"010-692-6593 x09125","website":"anastasia.net","company":{"name":"Deckow-Crist","catchPhrase":"Proactive didactic contingency","bs":"synergize scalable supply-chains"}} {"data":{"id":"#number","email":"#string","first_name":"#string","last_name":"#string","avatar":"#string"},"support":{"url":"#string","text":"#string"}}

testcase.name: [2.1:29] Get Non Existing User By ID
[1:10] Update User Successfully
testcase.failure:
